content: Fix over-cropping regression: don't split single-garment classes (Upper-clothes/Skirt/Pants/Dress) into multiple instances when graphic prints fragment the SegFormer mask
Issue #1: derive Item size from user.body_measurements based on category (AddItem + ItemDetail)
Lint, restart, smoke-test on a synthetic graphic-T scenario
Issue #3a: Strip heavy ML deps (torch/transformers/rembg/cuda/scipy/onnxruntime/...) from requirements.txt -> requirements-ml.txt
Issue #3b: Update deploy/Dockerfile.backend (Hetzner) to install both requirements files
Issue #3c: Update CORS to include the Emergent host origin
Issue #3d: Verify Emergent host: dev preview should still build/run after this change
